features: ACHIEVE VOLUMINOUS CURLS: Create stunning, voluminous curls without the heat damage! Our heatless curl headband offers beautiful, classic curls or waves with zero heat exposure. Made from silky smooth satin, it ensures gentle, overnight styling for flawless results.

PERFECT FOR ALL HAIR TYPES: Whether your hair is straight, wavy, long, or medium-length, this versatile overnight curler fits them all! Ideal for teens and adults alike, it‚Äôs the best heatless curling solution for achieving salon-worthy curls. Check our size chart for a perfect fit!

BYE BYE HAIR DAMAGE: Skip the damage on your hair routine and say hello to gorgeous hair with Kitsch Overnight Hair Curler! This no heat curling headband set includes a curling rod and two satin sleep scrunchies, all covered in high-quality, silky satin fabric. Achieve a flawless, voluminous look with heatless blowout rods for effortless, damage-free styling.

EASY TO USE: Effortlessly wrap your hair around the heatless curling rod, secure it with the included satin scrunchies, and let it work its magic while you sleep or air-dry. Watch our instructional videos for tips on achieving flawless curls every time!

GREAT GIFT WITH PERFECT SIZE: The Kitsch Sleep Curlers are the perfect gift for all hair types, whether it‚Äôs for a birthday, holiday, or just because. Sized for convenience‚Äîwidth: 3.5 inches, height: 8.5 inches, depth: 1 inch‚Äîit‚Äôs easy, comfortable, and delivers beautiful results every time!
